Music

04

About

Snow Day is a band of four 22-year-olds from Flagstaff, Arizona, building a sound that feels both rooted and forward-looking. Pulling from classic rock, jazz fusion, funk, and psychedelic music, the group blends groove, texture, and energy into songs that feel fresh without losing their edge.

Some tracks open up into swirling, immersive soundscapes. Others land hard with sharp hooks and deep-pocket riffs. Whether the set leans dreamy or danceable, Snow Day is always chasing something vibrant, honest, and unmistakably their own.

Find Snow Day online
